ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate at the time of data collection */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate at the time of data collection */,
  "stock_index_price" REAL /* Stock index price at the time of data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data feed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of economic data */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability or confidence level of the data */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_feed_id FOREIGN KEY ("feed_id") REFERENCES data_feeds ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the economic model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the economic model */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "model_last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  "model_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the economic model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic model using the parameter */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  "parameter_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES economic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic model used for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Value of the forecast */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of the forecast result */,
  "result_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  "result_confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the forecast */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES economic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, portfolio manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed and salted) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES economic_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_reliability" REAL /* Reliability of the data source */,
  "source_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing the feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of the data feed */,
  "feed_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data feed */,
  "feed_last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update of the data feed */,
  "feed_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_feeds_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the news article */,
  "article_type" TEXT /* Type of the news article */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  "article_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the news article */,
  "article_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the news article */,
  "article_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message in the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "alert_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
